raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed a pending charge on my Citi/AAdvantage XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XX/XX/23 for {$2000.00} as I did not make or authorize the charge. I formally disputed the charge on XX/XX/23 and provided all relevant information. The agent informed me that the charge had been made over the phone and not swiped. 

On XX/XX/23, I was advised via the app that I would be responsible for the charge and no credit would be provided. 

This is NOT acceptable and I expect Citi to provide evidence I made this charge along with providing an acceptable credit as soon as possible including all applicable finance fees.
